blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
